name: Oatmeal Scotches
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Hershey's Butterscotch Morsels package
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Mix flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon, set aside.
Cream shortening and sugars, add eggs and vanilla; beat until creamy.
Add the flour mixture, then mix well. Stir in oats and butterscotch morsels.
Drop onto cookie sheet.
Bake for 7-8 minutes for chewy cookies or 10-12 minutes for crisper cookies.
